name: Total Daily Energy Expenditure Calculator
description: Industrial-grade TDEE calculator based on anthropometric inputs, activity factors, and metabolic adjustment formulas. Compliant with ISO 8996 (ergonomics of the thermal environment) and lean energy balance principles.

inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Age affects basal metabolic rate; used in Mifflin-St Jeor and Harris-Benedict equations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age affects basal metabolic rate; used in Mifflin-St Jeor and Harris-Benedict equations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yaş, bazal metabolizma hızını etkiler; Mifflin-St Jeor ve Harris-Benedict denklemlerinde kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter beeinflusst den Grundumsatz; verwendet in den Mifflin-St-Jeor- und Harris-Benedict-Gleichungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: L'âge affecte le métabolisme de base ; utilisé dans les équations de Mifflin-St Jeor et Harris-Benedict.
businessContext_i18n.es: La edad afecta la tasa metabólica basal; se usa en las ecuaciones de Mifflin-St Jeor y Harris-Benedict.
businessContext_i18n.ar: يؤثر العمر على معدل الأيض الأساسي؛ يُستخدم في معادلات ميفلين-سانت جيور وهاريس-بنديكت.

inputs.label: Gender
inputs.businessContext: Gender-specific coefficients for BMR estimation per ISO 8996 and clinical standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: Gender-specific coefficients for BMR estimation per ISO 8996 and clinical standards.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 8996 ve klinik standartlara göre BMR tahmini için cinsiyete özgü katsayılar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschlechtsspezifische Koeffizienten für die BMR-Schätzung nach ISO 8996 und klinischen Standards.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficients spécifiques au sexe pour l'estimation du métabolisme de base selon la norme ISO 8996 et les normes cliniques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficientes específicos de género para la estimación de la TMB según ISO 8996 y estándares clínicos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معاملات خاصة بالجنس لتقدير معدل الأيض الأساسي وفقًا لمعيار ISO 8996 والمعايير السريرية.

inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: Primary driver of energy expenditure; used in all BMR formulas.

businessContext_i18n.en: Primary driver of energy expenditure; used in all BMR formulas.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Enerji harcamasının ana belirleyicisi; tüm BMR formüllerinde kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Haupttreiber des Energieverbrauchs; wird in allen BMR-Formeln verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Principal moteur de la dépense énergétique ; utilisé dans toutes les formules de métabolisme de base.
businessContext_i18n.es: Principal impulsor del gasto energético; se usa en todas las fórmulas de TMB.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المحرك الأساسي لإنفاق الطاقة؛ يُستخدم في جميع صيغ معدل الأيض الأساسي.

inputs.label: Height
inputs.businessContext: Height influences lean body mass and BMR; used in Mifflin-St Jeor and Harris-Benedict.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height influences lean body mass and BMR; used in Mifflin-St Jeor and Harris-Benedict.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Boy, yağsız vücut kütlesini ve BMR'yi etkiler; Mifflin-St Jeor ve Harris-Benedict'te kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Größe beeinflusst fettfreie Körpermasse und BMR; verwendet in Mifflin-St-Jeor und Harris-Benedict.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La taille influence la masse maigre et le métabolisme de base ; utilisé dans Mifflin-St Jeor et Harris-Benedict.
businessContext_i18n.es: La altura influye en la masa magra y la TMB; se usa en Mifflin-St Jeor y Harris-Benedict.
businessContext_i18n.ar: يؤثر الطول على كتلة الجسم الخالية من الدهون ومعدل الأيض الأساسي؛ يُستخدم في معادلات ميفلين-سانت جيور وهاريس-بنديكت.

inputs.label: Activity Level
inputs.businessContext: Physical activity level (PAL) multiplier per WHO/FAO and ISO 8996 metabolic rate classification.

businessContext_i18n.en: Physical activity level (PAL) multiplier per WHO/FAO and ISO 8996 metabolic rate classification.
businessContext_i18n.tr: WHO/FAO ve ISO 8996 metabolik hız sınıflandırmasına göre fiziksel aktivite düzeyi (PAL) çarpanı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für körperliche Aktivität (PAL) nach WHO/FAO und ISO 8996-Klassifikation des Stoffwechsels.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur du niveau d'activité physique (PAL) selon la classification OMS/FAO et ISO 8996 du taux métabolique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador del nivel de actividad física (PAL) según la clasificación metabólica de la OMS/FAO e ISO 8996.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مضاعف مستوى النشاط البدني (PAL) وفقًا لتصنيف منظمة الصحة العالمية/الفاو ومعيار ISO 8996 لمعدلات الأيض.

inputs.label: Body Fat Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Optional input for Katch-McArdle formula; improves accuracy for lean mass estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional input for Katch-McArdle formula; improves accuracy for lean mass estimation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Katch-McArdle formülü için isteğe bağlı girdi; yağsız kütle tahmininde doğruluğu artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Optionale Eingabe für die Katch-McArdle-Formel; verbessert die Genauigkeit bei Schätzung der fettfreien Masse.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrée optionnelle pour la formule de Katch-McArdle ; améliore la précision pour l'estimation de la masse maigre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Entrada opcional para la fórmula de Katch-McArdle; mejora la precisión en la estimación de masa magra.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إدخال اختياري لمعادلة كاتش-مكاردل؛ يحسن الدقة لتقدير الكتلة الخالية من الدهون.

inputs.label: Athlete Mode
inputs.businessContext: Activates adjusted activity multipliers for high-frequency training (6+ sessions/week).

businessContext_i18n.en: Activates adjusted activity multipliers for high-frequency training (6+ sessions/week).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yüksek frekanslı antrenman (haftada 6+ seans) için ayarlanmış aktivite çarpanlarını etkinleştirir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktiviert angepasste Aktivitätsmultiplikatoren für hochfrequentes Training (6+ Einheiten/Woche).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Active des multiplicateurs d'activité ajustés pour un entraînement à haute fréquence (6+ séances/semaine).
businessContext_i18n.es: Activa multiplicadores de actividad ajustados para entrenamiento de alta frecuencia (6+ sesiones/semana).
businessContext_i18n.ar: تفعيل مضاعفات النشاط المعدلة للتدريب عالي التردد (6+ جلسات/أسبوع).

rules.message: Age must be between 10 and 120 years.
Weight must be between 20 and 300 kg.
Height must be between 50 and 250 cm.
Body fat percentage must be between 3% and 60%.
Athlete mode is incompatible with sedentary activity level.
Body fat percentage is recommended for Katch-McArdle formula accuracy.

thresholds.message: BMR is critically low; verify inputs.
TDEE exceeds typical range; consider professional assessment.
Very high energy expenditure may indicate overtraining risk.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
